story_summary_zh: 美地之后是没有桥的死河——通往天城必须经过。河水随惧怕加深、随信心变浅；盼望在水中扶持天路客『记得你所信的是谁，不是看水有多深』，直到双脚踏上彼岸。
story_summary_en: Beyond Beulah lies the bridgeless River of Death—the City cannot be reached but through it. The water deepens with fear and grows shallow with faith; in the water Hopeful steadies the pilgrim, 'remember the one you trust, not how deep the water is', until his feet touch the far bank.
spiritual_theme_zh: 死亡是最后的试炼，不能靠装备、财富或名声渡过，唯靠信靠基督；惧怕使水加深，信心使水变浅。
spiritual_theme_en: Death is the final trial, crossed not by gear, wealth, or fame but by trust in Christ; fear deepens the water, faith makes it shallow.

bible_references.note_zh: 你从水中经过，我必与你同在；你趟过江河，水必不漫过你。
bible_references.note_en: When you pass through the waters I will be with you; the rivers shall not overwhelm you.

bible_references.note_zh: 死啊，你得胜的权势在哪里？……感谢神，使我们借着主耶稣基督得胜。
bible_references.note_en: O death, where is your victory? Thanks be to God, who gives us victory through our Lord Jesus Christ.

bible_references.note_zh: 我虽然行过死荫的幽谷，也不怕遭害，因为你与我同在。
bible_references.note_en: Though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for you are with me.

discussion_questions.question_zh: 为什么有时候水很深，有时候水很浅？
discussion_questions.question_en: Why is the water sometimes deep and sometimes shallow?

discussion_questions.question_zh: 盼望说『不要看水有多深，要记得你所信的是谁』。这对面对恐惧有什么帮助？
discussion_questions.question_en: Hopeful says 'don't look at the depth, remember the one you trust'. How does this help with fear?

discussion_questions.question_zh: 面对死亡或巨大的失去，什么使你的『水』变浅？什么使它变深？
discussion_questions.question_en: Facing death or great loss, what makes your 'water' shallow—what makes it deep?

teacher_notes_zh: 不要把死河讲得恐怖；重点是『不是独自经过』与信靠。
渡河不是凭感觉（感觉常说要沉了），而是凭所信的对象。
teacher_notes_en: Don't make the river ghoulish; the point is 'not crossing alone' and trust.
Crossing is not by feeling (feeling says you're sinking) but by the One trusted.
reflection_prompt_zh: 写下：什么『最后的河』是我惧怕的？哪一句应许能使那水变浅？
reflection_prompt_en: Write down: what 'last river' do I fear—which promise can make that water shallow?
prayer_prompt_zh: 主啊，你应许我经过水时你与我同在；当我惧怕的水加深，求你叫我记得我所信的是你。
prayer_prompt_en: Lord, you promise to be with me through the waters; when fear's water deepens, make me remember the One I trust is you.
